raw.message: Crush your opponents, dominate the battlefield!

hook.summary: High-intensity mech combat showcasing a kill streak.
hook.visual_action: A blue mech fires energy weapons at enemies in an industrial port setting.

scene_flow: Player mech engages enemies from a distance, triggering a 'RAMPAGE' notification.
The mech closes in on a large enemy Titan, firing multiple weapon systems.
Intense close-range firefight results in a 'KILL' and 'TITAN SLAYER' achievement.
Cinematic transition to the game's logo and final call to action.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy competitive multiplayer shooters and giant robot combat.
